creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
garga       2007-08-08 13:12:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    shells/perlsh        Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    shells/perlsh/files  pkg-deinstall.in pkg-install.in 
  Removed files:
    shells/perlsh        pkg-deinstall pkg-install 
  Log:
  - Update to 1.8.1 [1]
  - Use DATADIR in pkg-plist
  - Move pkg-install and pkg-deinstall to files/ and use SUB_FILES
  - Change MASTER_SITES to use MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN
  
  PR:             ports/115281 [1]
  Submitted by:   Felippe de Meirelles Motta <lippe@freebsdbrasil.com.br> [1]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.23      +8 -3      ports/shells/perlsh/Makefile
